text: GS  Construction  Mountain,  LLC  expects  its  independent  subcontractors  to  comply  with  all applicable OSHA standards and those GS Construction Mountain, LLC's safety standards and policies which are applicable to Subcontractors. Although GS Construction Mountain, LLC does not become involved in the means and the methods of its subcontractor's work, any subcontractor who fails to comply with any and all safety standards and policies and refuses to cooperate in providing a safe work site, shall be subject to back charges by GS Construction Mountain, LLC for making corrections to any subcontractor's unsafe work practices, or, at its option, GS Construction Mountain,  LLC  may  withhold  progress  payments  until  Subcontractor  corrects  any  safety violations.  In  the  event  of  persistent  or  repeated  refusals  to  work  in  accordance  with  GS Construction Mountain, LLC's safety standards and policies and/or OSHA standards, after written warning, GS Construction Mountain, LLC may terminate the subcontracts of such subcontractors.
